answer:
<think> The Chicago Bulls received a player from the Timberwolves in the 1993-94 NBA season. To find out the nationality of this player, I need to identify who that player was. I know that the Bulls had several notable acquisitions during that time, but one of the most significant was the acquisition of Scottie Pippen. However, Scottie Pippen was not acquired through a trade with the Timberwolves, but rather from the Portland Trail Blazers. I need to keep looking. Another player who was acquired from the Timberwolves during that season was Tom Thibodeau, but he was not a player, but a coach. I need to focus on players. I remember that the Bulls received a young power forward named Bill Wennington in a trade with the Timberwolves. Bill Wennington is a Canadian. </think>
<answer> \boxed{Canadian}
